reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Always crowded. Queues. It's a disgrace that they don't hire more staff. The beach attendants do the best they can.

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia estamos mejorando al atención esperamos que su próxima visita sea de si agrado
